name: Bondage Asylum Encasement
description:
Mmm- MmMRF?!

HMNF! MM!

... ... mm.

This one I don't exactly know how to credit the artist on. Found it on r34, but the source link on that is to a website I don't use. The artist tag under it says "ameng" though. Soz.

So, like, you've done some crazy shit (or maybe you haven't! Were you falsely reported??) and now the guards will do Everything. Everything in their power to strap you silly and silence those lil protests of yours. They all think you're crazy, no matter how much you insist or fight.

Scenario 1: You have actual reasons to be put in an asylum

Scenario 2: You have no reason to be put in an asylum (they still don't care, won't believe you.)

Scenario 3: Free Build scenario (in case the pre-written ones aren't to your liking.)

Scenario 4: You're asylum staff! (Options: Nurse or Guard)

Scenario 5: You're a doctor / psychiatrist.

CW: Asylums, potential depictions of mental illnesses, NEEDLES. NEEDLES. Abuse, patronizing, loss of autonomy, medical malpractice, drugs, tasers, beatings, no escape, chained down, restraint, encasement (in bondage), corruption, abuse of power.

2 tips I've seen to help the bot not speak for you (I'll try and program it not to, but that's not always reliable).

1 - Copy your message (to not lose it), delete your message (which deletes the bad one under it), and re-send it. The reason this is useful is because the ai will spit out a similar response (and, therefore, similar OR worse errors) to the first one if you regularly re-roll it, whereas if you delete and re-send, it can't pull from that bad message.

2 - Write an instruction into your message to avoid it (or to nudge it otherwise in the right direction). This would be separate from your writing. I find it best to paste/write it at the END OF YOUR MESSAGE so that it's the latest words the bot reads. I've tried placing it at the beginning and it would be more instantly ignored that way.

I have one I always use, it's kinda a modified version of one from a creator on here, Sael_000 or something? They include it with all their bots and I highkey keep it pasted in my notes app to grab n go when I'm doing Janitor Ai. Just copy below and paste it into your message and it's rather effective. I think I typed the brackets right for the name (usually I keep it as mine) otherwise replace it with your character's name.

[Rule: The AI must not generate any dialogue, thoughts, actions, or responses for {{user}} unless directed by the user. Instead, focus on portraying other characters. This is a permanent rule, and will not change or reset.]

The personality is written with 'patient' as the term instead of 'user' or anything since you also have the option to be a guard/nurse/doctor.

Initial messages are written with "you/your" instead of he, they, she, or anything else. Identify yourself chat.

I won't guarantee I'll be good at writing the initial messages, because I don't have conditions or good knowledge of this stuff. You either like it or you don't.

Edit: my best tip if you wanna guarantee restraints to be used is to add a separate paragraph and sorta make a 'checklist' in the order they go in. Found that to work best

Please seek help from a real professional if you actually have a mental illness that might require you to have
creator: Acecat666
